title: OaksPaintings
body:
# Disclaimer, this mod is currently discontinued
Building upon the success of mods like Oaks Decor and Oaks Nature, Oaks Paintings aims to further enhance the visual experience of your Minecraft world.

With over 30 unique paintings, this mod seamlessly integrates with both vanilla Minecraft and other compatible mods, Whether you're a builder, decorator, or simply someone who appreciates the finer details, this mod offers a diverse selection of paintings that will add depth, beauty, and character to your surroundings.
